secretKey.description: Openfort API secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...)

network.description: Network to use for wallet operations (EVM only)

usdcContractId.description: Optional: Openfort USDC contract ID from dashboard (con_...) - auto-created if not provided

enableFeeSponsorship.description: Enable fee sponsorship with USDC gas payment (default: true)
